items.html: And know that just as there is a first Ruach [spirit] in the discernment of MAN [Mayin Nukvin], so there is a first Ruach that her husband casts into her in the secret of the Zivug [coupling] of the first kisses — for these, too, are called a Zivug. And that first Ruach from the first kisses remains forever in the mouth of the female, in the Yesod of her mouth, which is her tongue; and it remains there for the need of the other Zivugim of kisses from then onward, in the way mentioned regarding the first Ruach of the MAN.
